final_prompt.prompt: 35mm film photography portrait, soft and airy aesthetic, fine-grain film texture with gentle halation, natural diffused window light from the side, soft bokeh background, young woman with delicate facial features, porcelain smooth skin with subtle natural flush on cheeks, loose flowing hair with wispy strands catching the light, minimal makeup with soft pink lips and barely-there mascara, wearing a light linen or cotton blouse in cream or pale pastel tone, relaxed effortless posture with slight shoulder drop, gentle dreamy expression with soft unfocused gaze into the distance, slight natural smile, warm golden hour or overcast daylight color grading, muted warm tones with lifted shadows and soft highlights, creamy whites and dusty pastels throughout, shallow depth of field with buttery smooth out-of-focus background, blurred soft greenery or neutral interior in background, airy and ethereal mood, romantic and intimate atmosphere, timeless film portrait feel, Kodak Portra 400 color rendition, subtle lens flare, soft contrast, lifted blacks, 8K detail within film grain aesthetic, sharp focus on eyes and facial features, no harsh shadows, no over-sharpening, no plastic skin texture, no watermark
Cinematic dreamy 35mm portrait, soft diffused light, gentle bokeh, film grain, pastel tones, intimate close framing.

A soft and airy 35mm film portrait of a young woman standing in gentle natural light, captured with a vintage film camera aesthetic. The subject gazes slightly off-camera with a serene and contemplative expression, her loose hair catching the warm afternoon sunlight filtering through a sheer curtain. The color palette is muted and pastel, with creamy highlights and delicate grain characteristic of 35mm film photography. Bokeh background softly dissolves into pale tones of ivory and blush. The composition is intimate and unhurried, emphasizing the quiet beauty of the moment. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, soft focus, warm tones, 8K, high resolution, masterpiece.
Negative Prompts: no harsh shadows, no oversaturation, no digital sharpness, no plastic skin, no heavy makeup, no watermark, no text, no distorted features.
Aspect Ratio: 2:3.

Soft dreamy 35mm film portrait editorial, a young woman with delicate features and gentle expression, minimal natural makeup with soft skin texture and loose flowing hair, Rinko Kawauchi inspired analog film photography on 35mm Kodak Portra 400, standing near a sun-drenched window with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh background, warm golden hour diffused light casting gentle shadows and creating an airy ethereal mood

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: portrait photography, square crop
Primary request: soft and airy 35mm film portrait of a person
Scene/backdrop: minimal or softly blurred natural background, gentle bokeh
Subject: person with natural relaxed expression, delicate skin texture, soft hair catching light
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, analog grain, dreamy editorial
Composition/framing: medium close-up portrait, 50mm equivalent lens, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural window light or golden hour glow, gentle and ethereal mood
Color palette: warm creamy skin tones, muted pastels, soft whites and gentle shadows
Materials/textures: fine film grain, smooth skin with subtle pores, soft fabric texture
Constraints: keep the portrait intimate and human, preserve analog film aesthetic
Avoid: harsh flash, over-retouched plastic skin, heavy vignette, digital HDR look, watermark
